settings.question: How do I track my order?
settings.answer: Once your order is dispatched, you'll receive a tracking link via email and WhatsApp. You can also reach out to our support team anytime for a status update.

settings.question: Can I change my size after ordering?
settings.answer: Yes — contact us within 12 hours of placing your order and we'll arrange a size swap at no extra cost. Reach out via WhatsApp for the fastest response.

settings.question: What is your return policy?
settings.answer: We accept returns and exchanges within 7 days of delivery for unworn items in original packaging. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after we receive the item.

settings.question: What payment methods do you accept?
settings.answer: We accept all major credit/debit cards, UPI, net banking, and popular wallets. Cash on delivery is also available for select locations across India.
